name: Harel Insurance Investments & Financial Services Ltd
summary: Harel Insurance Investments & Financial Services Ltd. provides insurance and financial services in Israel and internationally. It operates through five segments: Life Assurance and Long-Term Savings, Health Insurance, Non-life insurance, Insurance Companies Overseas, and Capital Market and Financial Services. The company offers various classes of life insurance products, which provide coverage for risks, such as death, disability, work disability, and critical illness; and long-term saving products, as well as manages pension and provident funds. It also provides health insurance that provides coverage for illness and hospitalization, and personal accident; travel insurance, insurance for foreign workers, and insurance for tourists; and dental insurance for conservative, periodontal, orthodontic, oral rehabilitation treatments, etc. In addition, it offers motor property insurance; mortgage insurance; credit insurance; professional liability insurance for tax advisors, portfolio managers, attorneys, engineers, architects, and accountants; insurance for clinical trials; directors and officers liability insurance; liability insurance for defective products; cyber insurance; and third-party liability insurance and employers' liability insurance. Further, it provides fire and theft, home, business premises, goods in transit, electronic equipment, and mechanical failure insurance, as well as insurance for building work and various projects by contractors. Additionally, the company manages mutual funds and exchange traded notes with a range of local and foreign stocks and bond indexes, as well as investment portfolios for private customers, corporations, and institutional customers; offers investment services, index-linked and deposit certificates on various currencies, and consulting services in foreign currency; and trades in securities. It also invests in real estate assets. The company was founded in 1933 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel.
